feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Home, Coded In You
entry.summary:
Author: IrishMum1710

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,600Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 19

Summary: Buck accidentally falls down a rabbit hole involving WWII carrier pigeons, unsolved military ciphers, and one message that never made it home. Eddie watches him try to decode it piece by piece and realises, somewhere along the way, that he’s been in love with Buck for years. Unfortunately, Buck starts figuring that out too.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Drifting Away
entry.summary:
Author: Spacers24

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,548Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 453

Summary: Eddie saw the patient lying on the street, blood all around them. There's a few produce lying around and some broken beer can, looks like the patient was just done with grocery shopping when they got hit. It's only when he gets closer that he recognizes who the patient is.    His blood turns cold as he sees a broken and bloodied Buck lying on the ground.    “BUCK!!”  ===========Caught in an accident on his day off, Buck slips into a deep coma. The 118 is left reeling as Buck's life hangs in the balance, can they pull themselves together and will Buck ever wake up?

entry.title: My Dreams Are Just Dreams
entry.summary:
Author: Feybird395

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 45,098Chapters: 4/11Kudos: 67

Summary: Evan Buckley was nine years old the day he disappeared. It takes eleven years of hell to get the courage to escape the organisation that raised him. It'll take years more before he finally feels like a person again, for the ghosts of his past to stop haunting his every move. He becomes Buck, becomes a firefighter, finds a family, a sister, and two best friends. And then when he's thirty-one, Chris is taken. And if he wants to get him back, he'll need to face the past he thought he'd finally escaped. (OR: A Red Room, Assassin AU)

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.summary:

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,272Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 45

entry.title: i called from the dark, and you picked up the phone
entry.summary:
Author: insidethevoid

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,806Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 84

Summary: Eddie is laid out on the floor of a hospital elevator, pressing his soaked t-shirt into a still bleeding wound, and he doesn’t know if the light is real. It’s true what they say about dying. There is some sort of ethereal light that beckons you towards it. Eddie has seen it more than once. The light is bright and warm, and every time Eddie sees it, he runs in the other direction.Eddie has nothing but time as he bleeds out on the floor of the hospital elevator. (918 coda)

entry.title: Wiped out and Wishing you were here
entry.summary:
Author: Buddieforever1111

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,977Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 85

Summary: He’s holding what Buck can only assume is his medical chart on a clipboard. The first words out of his mouth are, “It’s not cancer.” Well, he didn’t think it was, but at least that ball is knocked out of the park. Before the nice, burly man at the foot of his bed can even explain what it actually is, Buck speaks up first. “Than what is it?” He has been nonstop shivering since the moment he stumbled into the hospital yesterday. Or.... My first sick fic where Buck gets sick after the lawsuit and feels like no one will be there for him. He's happy to be proven wrong when a brown-eyed man walks into his room with a soft smile and a look of determination.

entry.summary:

entry.title: NOT IN MY HOSPITAL!!
entry.summary:
Author: Romanancy7280

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,115Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 10

Summary: Johana, the new pediatric resident, had been prepared for endless shifts, difficult patients, and the constant exhaustion that came with the specialty. What no one warned her about was that she would have to survive the medical equivalent of a “Category Five natural disaster”: the endless wars between the head of the department, Dr. Evan Buckley, and the chief surgeon, Dr. Eddie Díaz. Between arguments in the OR, chaos in the hallways, and patients who always seem to arrive at the absolute worst possible moment, Johana begins considering — for the fifth time that day — suing the hospital… or maybe just running away before she completely loses her mind. Or A hospital AU where the 118 family is a walking disaster. And, of course, it’s almost always Buckley and Díaz’s fault. What a surprise, right?

entry.title: And If I Drown, What Then?
entry.summary:
Author: Allypop_84

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 69,302Chapters: 18/30Kudos: 981

Summary: "Yeah, well, we have—moved on." Eddie's expression didn’t soften. "You should too, Buck." He deflated, the fight draining out of him. For the first time since they met, Buck felt like he was staring at a stranger. “Uh— yeah I get it,” he finally said. “And I really am sorry.” He watched as Eddie's figure retreated. If Buck had stayed quiet, maybe he could have kept pretending that time would heal this wound. After that disaster of a conversation, Buck wasn't sure it ever would. He stood there, windows forgotten, feeling something he’d known his whole life shift into place. Buck never thought Eddie would be the one to show him he was right.   Or A Buck and Eddie post-lawsuit fic. ----------- Please heed the tags! This fic explores alcohol and substance abuse and may be triggering for some readers. If these themes are difficult for you, please put yourself first.

entry.summary:

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 52,720Chapters: 29/30Kudos: 654

entry.title: there's gonna be a big spot where i once lay
entry.summary:
Author: familydontendwithblood

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,626Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 63

Summary: For a man caught between denying the existence of the supernatural but still clinging to a faith he didn't necessarily feel connected to, he certainly wasn't expecting death to be…….what was this? He's slumped against the wall of the elevator in a pool of his own blood, just as he had been right before he died, though the pain was significantly less now. More of a dull ache, just kind of there in the background. He's surprised. He wasn't sure what he believed in, in terms of after dying, but he did kind of always think there wouldn't be any pain, after. "You're not dead, genius." His head turns, and it's. Jesus. It's Shannon. *** Or: Eddie sees the ghost of Shannon, bleeds out, and realizes he’s in love with Buck, not necessarily in that order.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: Will You Tell Him What You Told Me
entry.summary:
Author: FireFireFFYre

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,602Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 186

Summary: “Oh…i think i know what i want to say to you…” Buck smiles down at him, face shadowed under the fluorescent lights, “yeah?” There’s some anxious amusement in his voice, “you’ve got your last words?” Eddie nods to himself, “yeah.” ———— Eddie gets stuck in the elevator, except Buck is there too. It changes a couple things.

entry.title: buck up 'n ride
entry.summary:
Author: kryptonian

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,840Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 535

Summary: “You sold your dick?” Eddie says, voice pitching higher than it should. Everyone snaps to look at him, and Eddie’s cheeks suddenly flush with warmth. Okay. Maybe he’s drunk. “No…not exactly,” Buck says, “I let them like… take a mould. Take some pictures. That’s not— it could be the lie! You guys have to guess!” “No,” Eddie slurs, tilting forward, an accusatory finger pointed. “I don’t believe you. And the car thing is—” A slightly drunken hiccup. “Bullshit. You can’t tell two lies.” Horrified at the allegation, Buck gasps, hand slapped against his sternum. “You think I’d— Eddie, the sanctity of two truths and a lie is really, really important to me.”OR: One Life-Altering, Buck-Dick-Shaped Truth.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: You should be alone with me
entry.summary:
Author: dizzyizzydee

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,836Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 14

Summary: "Buck is being a bitch. That’s the only way Eddie can word how he feels. Every time he thinks it he feels like a 13 year old girl. It was the type of thing his little sisters would say when they had a falling out with their insanely intense friend groups. He’d ask what was wrong and the only words they’d be able to articulate were “Olivia’s being a bitch” or something like that. Now that was him. A grown man, a father, looking at Hen who was kindly asking what was wrong as he sulked in the corner of the station loft and as he stares at her the only words going through his head are Buck is being a bitch. He’s being bitchy." Eddie is feeling dejected and crazy. Buck is pulling away but nothing happened that Eddie can pinpoint. They're still best friends, so why is he feeling so upset? On the other hand Buck is desperately trying to shove his own feelings away. Fixated on getting over Eddie so they can get back to 'normal' Buck unwittingly sends their entire friendship into a freefall.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: An Ocean in My Body (a River in My Soul)
entry.summary:
Author: thetalee

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 45,780Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 209

Summary: A bible tale comes alive. Fire rains from the sky. It's pretty much a typical day for the 118. But there is change in the air as the leaves begin to change color in preparation for the fall. Everything changes eventually, inevitably. And sometimes a person finds themselves in mourning for something that isn't yet gone.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: stop at every floor on the way down
entry.summary:
Author: Rehearsal_Dweller

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,211Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 236

Summary: “Eddie,” Buck says, as he realizes. “Where’s Eddie?”There’s a few overlapping what and I thought he was – and wasn’t he justs, but it’s clear nobody actually knows.or: Buck, on Eddie being hurt.
